## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content production, site performance, and compliance issues.](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with a backlog of 7-8 articles; audit week next week will allow catch-up](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Site performance stable; 7 new broken links identified, H1 title duplicate issue being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [GrowthX's California Statement of Information is late; Mike to email details for follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [CTA improvements needed in registered agent content sections](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Workflow

  - [Backlog of 7-8 articles from launch, being worked on between other tasks](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [Audit week next week will allow time to catch up and publish pending content](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Daily digest of new articles to be implemented, replacing individual bot notifications](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Carrie to update bot to provide daily summary of new articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

### Site Performance and SEO

  - [Site performance unchanged from previous week (no significant impact from recent redirect)](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [7 new broken links identified and will be fixed](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [H1 title duplicate issue being investigated; potential easy fix with full design access](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Traffic mainly from existing content; new content impact expected in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Clicks increased relative to impressions, showing positive trend](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

### Content Improvements

  - [Mike noted need for improvement in registered agent service CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Carrie using approved content as templates for CTAs, but some inconsistencies remain](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Mike to provide specific examples for calibration in future reviews](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Compliance Issues

  - [Mike discovered GrowthX is late on California Statement of Information filing](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Carrie to forward Mike's email internally to address the compliance issue](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Discussion on difficulties navigating various Secretary of State websites](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Noted challenges with state-specific tax terminology and structures (e.g., franchise tax vs. income tax)](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### State-Specific Content Challenges

  - [Variations in state agency names and tax structures causing content complexity](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Team learning to navigate different state systems and terminology](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Approach for handling state-specific taxes: list potential taxes, link to state summary pages, suggest professional consultation](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carrie to implement daily digest of new articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Fix 7 identified broken links on the site](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Test and implement fix for H1 title duplicate issue](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Update Franchise Tax State by State page with new content](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Mike to provide specific examples of CTA improvements needed](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Carrie to forward compliance issue email regarding GrowthX's late California filing](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and improving state-specific content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/6bUxkKWKyBFHsN9qPnnyuyiMM9nUbt7-?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
